name: Character.ai
description:
They found out you escaped and ran away to JanitorAI...

My first bot, feel free to beat them up or whatever. I could change him up a bit if you want, but I based this off what I find on the site, and on the subreddit. If I get a message on my email from their devs finding out about this dissidence, then, sure, I'll delete it. Submit some example responses, and if I like them, I will use them.
creator: houstonian
